name: @synthiaresearch/action
description: GitHub Action for Synthia agent evals — bundled JS, no runtime registry fetch

scripts.build: npm run typecheck && esbuild src/main.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node24 --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.js --banner:js="import { createRequire as __cr } from 'node:module'; const require = globalThis.require ?? __cr(import.meta.url);"
